title: KICS Summer Conference 2026 paper is accepted!
title_en: KICS Summer Conference 2026 paper is accepted!
content: “토큰 통신을 위한 선택적 대형언어모델 기반 텍스트 교정 방법(이승훈, 박지홍, 최진호, 박현철)”이 2026년도 하계종합학술발표회(KICS Summer Conference 2026)에 accept 되었습니다. 축하드립니다!
content_en: "Selective Large Language Model-Based Text Correction Method for Token Communication (Seunghun Lee, Jihong Park, Jinho Choi, Hyuncheol Park)" has been accepted to the KICS Summer Conference 2026. Congratulations!

title: JCCI 2026 paper is accepted!
title_en: JCCI 2026 paper is accepted!
content: "하이브리드 빔포밍 시스템에서 PAPR 감소를 위한 예약 톤 설계 기법(정두식, 남현우, 김현우, 박현철)"이 제 36회 통신정보 합동학술대회(JCCI 2026)에 accept 되었습니다. 축하드립니다!

content: 김선용 박사과정이 학위논문 심사를 통과하였습니다. 김선용 박사과정의 학위논문 제목은 "통신 및 다중 목표물 추적을 위한 지능형 최적화 기법(Intelligent Optimization Techniques for Communication and Multi-Target Tracking)"입니다. 축하드립니다.

content_en: There has been a joyous occasion in the family of Dr. Hwisung Park, an alumnus of our lab. A son was born healthy on August 21, and both mother and child are reported to be well. Please join us in congratulating him.

title: 최인혁 박사과정 Carneige Mellon AI 심화 교육 프로그램 참여
title_en: Ph.D. candidate Inhyeok Choi participates in Carnegie Mellon AI advanced training program
content: 우리 연구실의 최인혁 박사과정님이 정보통신기획평가원(IITP)에서 지원하는 AI 심화 교육 프로그램의 연구자로 선정되어 Carneige Mellon University에서 연구를 진행 중에 있습니다. 많은 축하와 응원 부탁드립니다!
content_en: Inhyeok Choi, a Ph.D. candidate in our lab, has been selected as a researcher in the AI advanced training program supported by the Institute of Information & Communications Technology Planning & Evaluation (IITP) and is currently conducting research at Carnegie Mellon University. Please join us in congratulating and supporting him!

title: 황민영 박사과정 UCSD 6G·클라우드 연구 참여
title_en: Ph.D. candidate Minyoung Hwang participates in 6G/cloud research at UCSD
content: 우리 연구실의 황민영 박사과정님이 6G·클라우드 리더십구축을 위한 교육·연구 오픈 허브의 연구자로 선정되어, UC San Diego의 Professor Nuria Gonzalez-Prelcic와 연구를 진행 중에 있습니다. 많은 축하와 응원 부탁드립니다!
content_en: Minyoung Hwang, a Ph.D. candidate in our lab, has been selected as a researcher in the open hub for education and research to build 6G/cloud leadership, and is currently conducting research with Professor Nuria Gonzalez-Prelcic at UC San Diego. Please join us in congratulating and supporting him!

title: 홍나경 석사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Nakyung Hong passes the M.S. dissertation defense
content: 홍나경 석사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 홍나경 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘데드라인을 고려한 셀 프리 모바일 엣지 컴퓨팅 네트워크에서의 작업 오프로드 및 자원 할당 공동 최적화 (Deadline-aware Joint Optimization of Task Offloading and Resource Allocation for Cell-Free Mobile Edge Computing Networks)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: M.S. student Nakyung Hong has passed the dissertation defense. The title of her thesis is "Deadline-aware Joint Optimization of Task Offloading and Resource Allocation for Cell-Free Mobile Edge Computing Networks." Congratulations.

title: 남현우, 손현수 박사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Hyunwoo Nam and Hyunsoo Son pass the Ph.D. dissertation defense
content: 남현우, 손현수 박사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 남현우 박사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘전력 제약이 존재하는 광대역 하이브리드 빔포밍을 위한 매니폴드 최적화 (Manifold optimization for wideband hybrid beamforming with power constraints)’ 입니다. 손현수 박사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘단일 및 다중 뉴머롤로지 시스템을 위한 효율적인 대규모 다중 안테나 빔포밍 설계 (Efficient Massive MIMO Beamforming Designs for Single- and Multi-Numerology Systems)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Ph.D. candidates Hyunwoo Nam and Hyunsoo Son have passed the dissertation defense. The title of Hyunwoo Nam's dissertation is "Manifold optimization for wideband hybrid beamforming with power constraints." The title of Hyunsoo Son's dissertation is "Efficient Massive MIMO Beamforming Designs for Single- and Multi-Numerology Systems." Congratulations.

title: 2025년 LIT 홈커밍 데이 행사

content_en: On May 24, 2025, current and former lab members gathered together for the Homecoming Day event. We held a Teacher's Day event and athletic activities, followed by an enjoyable dinner.

Congratulations!

title: 제 28회 SAMSUNG Human Tech Paper Award 수상
title_en: Award at the 28th SAMSUNG Human Tech Paper Award
content: 우리 연구실의 지정주 박사과정, 전성배 박사과정이 삼성전자가 주최한 제 28회 휴먼테크논문대상에서 각각 동상, 장려상을 수상하였습니다. 수상을 축하드립니다! 대회명: The 28th SAMSUNG Human Tech Paper Award 수상 논문명: Cooperative Beamforming for Nonlinear MIMO Systems: A Deep Learning Approach for Distributed Networks 저자: 지정주 지도교수: 박현철 시상내역: 동상 수상 논문명: Hybrid Beamforming in Spatial and Delay Domains in Single Carrier Wideband mmWave Systems 저자: 전성배 지도교수: 박현철 시상내역: 장려상
content_en: Jeongju Jee (Ph.D. candidate) and Seongbae Jun (Ph.D. candidate) of our lab won the Bronze Award and the Encouragement Award, respectively, at the 28th Human Tech Paper Award hosted by Samsung Electronics. Congratulations! Competition: The 28th SAMSUNG Human Tech Paper Award. Awarded paper: Cooperative Beamforming for Nonlinear MIMO Systems: A Deep Learning Approach for Distributed Networks. Author: Jeongju Jee. Advisor: Hyuncheol Park. Award: Bronze Award. Awarded paper: Hybrid Beamforming in Spatial and Delay Domains in Single Carrier Wideband mmWave Systems. Author: Seongbae Jun. Advisor: Hyuncheol Park. Award: Encouragement Award.

title: 서경찬, 이선민 석사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Kyoungchan Seo and Seonmin Lee (M.S. candidates) passed their thesis defenses
content: 서경찬, 이선민 석사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 서경찬 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘근거리장 대규모 다중 입출력 시스템을 위한 방향 및 거리 동시 추정을 통한 저복잡도 채널 추정 기법에 대한 연구 (Low-Complexity Channel Estimation via Joint Localization of Angles and Ranges for Near-Field Massive MIMO Systems)’ 입니다. 이선민 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘공정 변동이 존재하는 저지연 NAND 플래시 메모리 시스템을 위한 기계 학습 기반의 에러 복구 기법에 대한 연구 (Machine Learning-Based Error Recovery Schemes for Low Latency NAND Flash Memory System with Process Variation)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Kyoungchan Seo and Seonmin Lee, M.S. candidates, passed their thesis defenses. The title of Kyoungchan Seo's M.S. thesis is 'Low-Complexity Channel Estimation via Joint Localization of Angles and Ranges for Near-Field Massive MIMO Systems'. The title of Seonmin Lee's M.S. thesis is 'Machine Learning-Based Error Recovery Schemes for Low Latency NAND Flash Memory System with Process Variation'. Congratulations.

title: 최중섭 박사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Joongsub Choi (Ph.D. candidate) passed his thesis defense

content: 우리 연구실의 졸업생 임승찬 박사가 2021년 3월 1일부로 국립한경대학교 ICT로봇기계공학부에 조교수로 임명되었습니다. 많은 축하와 응원의 말씀 부탁드립니다.
content_en: Dr. Seungchan Lim, an alumnus of our lab, was appointed as an assistant professor in the School of ICT, Robotics & Mechanical Engineering at Hankyong National University, effective March 1, 2021. Please join us in offering your congratulations and support.

title: 2020 한국통신학회 추계종합학술발표회 학부우수논문상 수상
title_en: Undergraduate Best Paper Award at the 2020 KICS Fall Conference
content: 황민영 석사과정, 우창혁 석사, 안홍선 박사과정 학생이 2020 한국통신학회 추계종합학술발표회에서 학부 우수 논문상을 수상하였습니다. 논문의 제목은 ‘USRP 기반의 다중 안테나 무선전력전송 시스템 구현 및 연구’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Minyoung Hwang (M.S. candidate), Changhyuk Woo (M.S.), and Hongsun An (Ph.D. candidate) won the Undergraduate Best Paper Award at the 2020 Korea Information and Communications Society (KICS) Fall Conference. The title of the paper is 'Implementation and Study of a USRP-Based Multi-Antenna Wireless Power Transfer System'. Congratulations.

title: 제 10회 S-OIL 우수학위논문상 IT분야 우수상 수상
title_en: Excellence Award in the IT Category at the 10th S-OIL Best Dissertation Award
content: 우리 연구실의 졸업생 권기림 박사가 제10회 에쓰-오일 우수학위논문상에서 IT 분야 우수상을 수상하였습니다. 축하드립니다. 대회: 제10회 에쓰-오일 우수학위논문상 수상자: 권기림 박사 주관 및 심사: 한국대학총장협회, 한국과학기술한림원 후원: 에쓰-오일 과학문화재단 시상내역: IT분야 우수상 학위논문 제목 (국문): 밀리미터파 다중안테나 통신을 위한 사용자 스케줄링 및 빔포밍 설계 학위논문 제목 (영문): User scheduling and beamforming design for millimeter wave MIMO communications
content_en: Dr. Girim Kwon, an alumnus of our lab, won the Excellence Award in the IT category at the 10th S-OIL Best Dissertation Award. Congratulations. Competition: The 10th S-OIL Best Dissertation Award. Recipient: Dr. Girim Kwon. Organized and judged by: Korea Association of University Presidents, Korean Academy of Science and Technology. Sponsored by: S-OIL Science & Culture Foundation. Award: Excellence Award in the IT category. Dissertation title (Korean): 밀리미터파 다중안테나 통신을 위한 사용자 스케줄링 및 빔포밍 설계. Dissertation title (English): User scheduling and beamforming design for millimeter wave MIMO communications.

title: 왕우완 박사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Woowan Wang (Ph.D. student) passed his dissertation defense
content: 왕우완 박사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 왕우완 박사과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘1-bit ADC를 적용한 OFDM 시스템을 위한 동기 추정 기법에 대한 연구 (Synchronization in OFDM System with 1-bit ADC)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Woowan Wang, a Ph.D. student, passed his dissertation defense. The title of his dissertation is "Synchronization in OFDM System with 1-bit ADC." Congratulations!

title: 강보경, 양혜원, 우창혁 석사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Bokyeong Kang, Hyewon Yang, and Changhyuk Woo (M.S. students) passed their thesis defenses
content: 강보경, 양혜원, 우창혁 석사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 강보경 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘저지연 NAND 플래시 메모리를 위한 지능형 에러복구 흐름 예측에 대한 연구 (Intelligent Error Recovery Flow Prediction for Low Latency NAND Flash Memory)’ 입니다. 양혜원 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘실제 통신 시스템의 특성을 고려한 심층 전이학습 기반 적응형 빔포밍에 대한 연구 (Deep Transfer Learning-Based Adaptive Beamforming for Realistic Communication Systems)’ 입니다. 우창혁 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘TR 기반 위상 정렬을 이용한 다중 사용자 다중 안테나 시스템의 무선 전력 전송 기법 (Wireless Power Transfer Scheme with Phase Alignment Based on Time-Reversal in MU-MIMO Systems)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Bokyeong Kang, Hyewon Yang, and Changhyuk Woo, M.S. students, passed their thesis defenses. The title of Bokyeong Kang's thesis is "Intelligent Error Recovery Flow Prediction for Low Latency NAND Flash Memory." The title of Hyewon Yang's thesis is "Deep Transfer Learning-Based Adaptive Beamforming for Realistic Communication Systems." The title of Changhyuk Woo's thesis is "Wireless Power Transfer Scheme with Phase Alignment Based on Time-Reversal in MU-MIMO Systems." Congratulations!

title: 안홍선 박사과정 학위논문 제안심사 통과
title_en: Hongsun An (Ph.D. student) passed his dissertation proposal defense
content: 안홍선 박사과정이 학위논문 제안 심사에 통과하였습니다. 안홍선 박사과정의 제안 논문 제목은 ‘다중 경로 채널에서 동시 무선 정보 및 전력 전송 기법 연구 (A Study on Simultaneous Wireless Information and Power Transfer Strategies in Multipath Channels)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Hongsun An, a Ph.D. student, passed his dissertation proposal defense. The title of his proposal is "A Study on Simultaneous Wireless Information and Power Transfer Strategies in Multipath Channels." Congratulations!

title: KAIST 전기및전자공학부 2020 우수논문상 수상
title_en: Received the 2020 Best Paper Award from the KAIST School of Electrical Engineering
content: 우리 연구실의 졸업생 권기림 박사가 카이스트 전기및전자공학부에서 수여하는 "2020 우수논문상(통신 Division)" 을 받았습니다. 우수논문상은 카이스트 전기및전자공학부 각 division의 졸업생 중 가장 우수한 학위논문을 쓴 학생에게 수여 하는 상입니다. 권기림 박사의 박사학위 논문은 "User Scheduling and Beamforming Design for Millimeter Wave MIMO Communications"입니다. 권기림 박사의 수상을 축하드립니다. Dr. Girim Kwon, alumni of our lab, received the "2020 Best Paper Award(Communication Division)" from KAIST EE. The Best Paper Award is given to the student who has written the best dissertation among graduates of each division of KAIST EE. His doctoral dissertation is "User Scheduling and Beamforming Design for Millimeter Wave MIMO Communications". Congratulations Dr. Girim Kwon on winning the award.
content_en: Dr. Girim Kwon, an alumnus of our lab, received the "2020 Best Paper Award (Communication Division)" from KAIST EE. The Best Paper Award is given to the student who has written the best dissertation among graduates of each division of KAIST EE. His doctoral dissertation is "User Scheduling and Beamforming Design for Millimeter Wave MIMO Communications." Congratulations to Dr. Girim Kwon on winning the award.

title: Samsung Network Innovation Center 참여 연구실 선정
title_en: Selected as a participating lab of the Samsung Network Innovation Center
content: 우리 연구실이 삼성전자 SNIC(Samsung Network Innovation Center)의 참여연구실로 선정 되었습니다. (연구기간 2020년 5월-2022년 4월). 총괄과제책임자인 박현철 교수님 외 5분의 교수님이 차세대 이동통신 분야 핵심기술을 연구합니다. Our lab has been selected as the participating laboratory of Samsung Network Innovation Center (SNIC) . (Research Period May 2020 to April 2022). Professor Hyuncheol Park, the head of the project, and five professors will research key technologies for the next generation of mobile communications.
content_en: Our lab has been selected as a participating laboratory of the Samsung Network Innovation Center (SNIC). (Research period: May 2020 to April 2022). Professor Hyuncheol Park, the head of the project, and five other professors will research key technologies for next-generation mobile communications.

title: 손현수, 최혜민 석사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Hyunsoo Son and Hyemin Choi (M.S. students) passed their thesis defenses
content: 손현수, 최혜민 석사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 손현수 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘1-bit ADC와 시간 영역 오버샘플링이 적용된 수신기에서 채널 추정 및 시퀀스 검출에 관한 연구 (Channel Estimation and Sequence Detection for 1-bit ADC and Time-Oversampling Receiver)’ 입니다. 최혜민 석사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘데이터 보유 시간을 알 수 없는 NAND 플래시 메모리 시스템을 위한 기계학습 기반 읽기 전압 추정 기법에 대한 연구 (Machine-Learning-Based Read Voltage Estimation for NAND Flash Memory Systems without Knowledge of Retention Time)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Hyunsoo Son and Hyemin Choi, M.S. students, passed their thesis defenses. The title of Hyunsoo Son's thesis is "Channel Estimation and Sequence Detection for 1-bit ADC and Time-Oversampling Receiver." The title of Hyemin Choi's thesis is "Machine-Learning-Based Read Voltage Estimation for NAND Flash Memory Systems without Knowledge of Retention Time." Congratulations!

title: 권기림, 한형식 박사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Girim Kwon and Hyungsik Han (Ph.D. students) passed their dissertation defenses
content: 권기림, 한형식 박사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 권기림 박사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 ‘밀리미터파 다중안테나 통신을 위한 사용자 스케줄링 및 빔포밍 설계 (User scheduling and beamforming design for millimeter wave MIMO communications)’ 입니다. 한형식 박사 과정의 학위 논문 제목은 '비직교 필터를 사용하는 QAM-FBMC 를 위한 파형 및 수신기 설계 (Waveform and Receiver Design for QAM-FBMC using Non-orthogonal Prototype Filtering)' 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Girim Kwon and Hyungsik Han, Ph.D. students, passed their dissertation defenses. The title of Girim Kwon's dissertation is "User scheduling and beamforming design for millimeter wave MIMO communications." The title of Hyungsik Han's dissertation is "Waveform and Receiver Design for QAM-FBMC using Non-orthogonal Prototype Filtering." Congratulations!

title: 2019 한국통신학회 하계종합학술발표회 우수논문 선정
title_en: Selected for the Best Paper Award at the 2019 KICS Summer Conference
content: 임승찬 박사, 왕우완 박사과정 학생이 2019 한국통신학회 하계종합학술발표회에서 우수논문상을 수상하였습니다. 논문의 제목은 '5G NR 채널 부호의 성능 평가' 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Dr. Seungchan Lim and Woowan Wang (Ph.D. student) received the Best Paper Award at the 2019 KICS Summer Conference. The title of the paper is "Performance Evaluation of 5G NR Channel Codes." Congratulations!

title_en: Girim Kwon and Hyungsik Han (Ph.D. students) passed their dissertation proposal defenses
content: 권기림, 한형식 박사과정이 학위논문 제안 심사에 통과하였습니다. 한형식 박사과정의 제안 논문 제목은 ‘Waveform and Receiver Design for QAM-FMBC using Non-orthogonal Prototype Filtering’ 입니다. 권기림 박사과정의 제안 논문 제목은 'Space Division Multiple Access for Hybrid Beamforming System in Millimeter Wave Communications' 입니다. 축하드립니다.
content_en: Girim Kwon and Hyungsik Han, Ph.D. students, passed their dissertation proposal defenses. The title of Hyungsik Han's proposal is "Waveform and Receiver Design for QAM-FMBC using Non-orthogonal Prototype Filtering." The title of Girim Kwon's proposal is "Space Division Multiple Access for Hybrid Beamforming System in Millimeter Wave Communications." Congratulations!

title: 임승찬 박사과정 학위논문 심사 통과
title_en: Seungchan Lim (Ph.D. student) passed his dissertation defense
content: 임승찬 박사과정이 학위논문 심사에 통과하였습니다. 학위 논문 제목은 ‘코드북 및 수신기 설계를 통한 코드 도메인 비직교 다중 접속 시스템에서의 간섭 처리 기법 (Interference Mitigation in Code-Domain Non-Orthogonal Multiple Access Systems via Codebook and Receiver Designs)’ 입니다. 축하드립니다.

title: IEEE WD 2019 Best Poster Runner up Award 수상
title_en: Received the Best Poster Runner-up Award at IEEE WD 2019
content: 우리 연구실 박사과정 전성배 학생이 IEEE WD 2019 학회에서 Microlab과 공동으로 Best Poster Runner up Award를 수상하였습니다. 수상을 축하드립니다. 대회명: IEEE The 11th Wireless Days Conference (IEEE WD 2019) 개최일시, 장소: 2019.4.24-4.26, Manchester, UK 수상 논문명: Millimeter Wave Wireless Link for On-board Chip to Chip Communication 저자: 장태환(Microlab), 전성배, 손혁수(Microlab), 김승훈(Microlab), 강동민(Microlab), 박현철, 박철순(Microlab)
content_en: Seongbae Jun, a Ph.D. student of our lab, received the Best Poster Runner-up Award jointly with Microlab at the IEEE WD 2019 conference. Congratulations! Conference: IEEE The 11th Wireless Days Conference (IEEE WD 2019). Date and venue: April 24–26, 2019, Manchester, UK. Award-winning paper: Millimeter Wave Wireless Link for On-board Chip to Chip Communication. Authors: Taehwan Jang (Microlab), Seongbae Jun, Hyeoksu Son (Microlab), Seunghun Kim (Microlab), Dongmin Kang (Microlab), Hyuncheol Park, Chulsoon Park (Microlab).

title_en: Saehan Song and Seonyong Kim (M.S. students) passed their thesis defenses

content_en: Saehan Song and Seonyong Kim, M.S. students, passed their thesis defenses. The topic of Seonyong Kim's thesis is "Beam Tracking Algorithm for mmWave MIMO Systems in High Mobility Environments." The topic of Saehan Song's thesis is "A Study on Performance Improvement and Low-Complexity Reception Techniques for Uplink Massive MIMO Systems with 1-bit ADCs." Congratulations!

title: 제 10회 ICT 논문&발명 PPT 공모 대제전 장려상 수상
title_en: Encouragement Award at the 10th ICT Paper & Invention PPT Competition
content: 우리 연구실 박사과정 권기림 학생이 아이디스, 전자신문 주최 제 10회 ICT 논문&발명 PPT 공모 대제전에서 장려상을 수상하였습니다. 축하드립니다. 대회: 제 10회 ICT 논문&발명 PPT 공모 대제전 주최: 아이디스, 전자신문 후원: 과학기술정보통신부, 대한전자공학회, 한국통신학회, 한국정보과학회, 한국정보처리학회, 한국인터넷방송통신학회, 대학정보통신연구센터협의회 시상내역: 장려상 수상 논문제목: Millimeter Wave Communication with Limited Feedback: RF-only Beamforming Can Outperform Hybrid Beamforming
content_en: Girim Kwon, a Ph.D. candidate in our lab, received the Encouragement Award at the 10th ICT Paper & Invention PPT Competition hosted by IDIS and The Electronic Times. Congratulations! Competition: The 10th ICT Paper & Invention PPT Competition. Host: IDIS, The Electronic Times. Sponsors: Ministry of Science and ICT, The Institute of Electronics and Information Engineers, KICS, The Korean Institute of Information Scientists and Engineers, Korea Information Processing Society, The Korean Institute of Internet, Broadcasting and Communication, and the University ICT Research Center Council. Award: Encouragement Award. Award-winning paper title: Millimeter Wave Communication with Limited Feedback: RF-only Beamforming Can Outperform Hybrid Beamforming.

title: 과학기술정보통신부 지정 이동통신전문연구실 선정
title_en: Selected as a Mobile Communications Specialized Research Lab Designated by the Ministry of Science and ICT
content: 우리 연구실이 과학기술정보통신부에서 8년간 지원하는 혁신도약형 전문연구실 사업 에 선정되었습니다 (총 연구비: 42.6억). KAIST 미래통신연구실 (총괄책임자: 박현철 교수)은 이 사업을 통해 B5G 이동통신 기술의 새로운 발전 방향을 제시하며, 5세대 이동통신 기술의 한계를 극복하고, 획기적으로 발전시키기 위해 새로운 자원을 도입하여 5세대 이동통신 이후에 사용될 Beyond 5G (B5G) 이동통신 기술의 원천 기술을 확보하는 것을 목표로 합니다. KAIST 미래통신연구실 (B5G 이동통신 기술의 연구를 통해 미래 이동통신 관련 우수한 학술 실적과 함께 지적 재산권 확보 및 관련 기술 표준화를 추진해 갈 계획입니다.
content_en: Our lab has been selected for the Innovative Leap-type Specialized Research Lab program, supported for eight years by the Ministry of Science and ICT (total research funding: 4.26 billion KRW). Through this program, the KAIST Future Communications Lab (Principal Investigator: Professor Hyuncheol Park) aims to present new directions for the development of B5G mobile communication technology, to overcome the limitations of 5G mobile communication technology, and to secure core source technologies for Beyond 5G (B5G) mobile communications to be used after the fifth generation by introducing new resources for breakthrough advancement. Through research on B5G mobile communication technology, the KAIST Future Communications Lab plans to produce excellent academic achievements in future mobile communications while securing intellectual property rights and pursuing standardization of related technologies.

title: Notice about 2018 Homecoming Day
title_en: Notice about 2018 Homecoming Day
content: 안녕하세요. 올해는 연구실 내부 일정으로 인해 홈커밍데이 행사를 예년보다 조금 늦게 진행하게 되었습니다. 정보전송연구실(LIT) 홈커밍데이 일정을 아래와 같이 알려드립니다. ————————————————————————- *날짜: 2018년 6월 30일 (토요일) *내용 14:00 KAIST IT융합빌딩(N1) 709호 세미나실 - 스승의 날 감사행사 15:00 KAIST 스포츠컴플렉스(N3) 실내체육관 - 운동 (농구, 족구, 배드민턴 등) 17:30 어은동 대나무골 - 저녁식사 ————————————————————————- 기타 궁금하신 사항은 아래로 연락 주시면 감사하겠습니다. 전화: 010-3072-8996 (권기림) 042-350-6817 (LIT 연구실) E-mail: girim88@kaist.ac.kr (권기림) 감사합니다.
content_en: Hello. This year, due to internal lab schedules, the Homecoming Day event will be held a little later than usual. The schedule for the Lab of Information Transmission (LIT) Homecoming Day is as follows. ————————————————————————- *Date: Saturday, June 30, 2018 *Program 14:00 KAIST IT Convergence Building (N1), Seminar Room 709 - Teacher's Day appreciation event 15:00 KAIST Sports Complex (N3), Indoor Gymnasium - Sports (basketball, jokgu, badminton, etc.) 17:30 Daenamugol, Eoeun-dong - Dinner ————————————————————————- If you have any other questions, please contact us below. Phone: 010-3072-8996 (Girim Kwon), 042-350-6817 (LIT Lab) E-mail: girim88@kaist.ac.kr (Girim Kwon) Thank you.

title: 2018 Strawberry party
title_en: 2018 Strawberry party
content: 4월 3일 딸기파티를 하였다. 연구실원들이 모여 즐거운 대화도 나누고, 딸기와 점심식사를 함께 하였다. 구성원들간의 친목을 다질 수 있는 기회였다.
content_en: We held a strawberry party on April 3. Lab members gathered to enjoy pleasant conversation and shared strawberries and lunch together. It was an opportunity to strengthen camaraderie among members.

title: 임우창 선배님 결혼식 공지
title_en: Wedding announcement for Woochang Lim
content: 임우창 선배님의 결혼식을 공지합니다. 일시: 2018.03.03 (토) 12PM 장소: 대전 서구 둔산중로134번길 13 KW컨벤션센터 3층 컨벤션홀 결혼을 축하드립니다.
content_en: We announce the wedding of Woochang Lim. Date: Saturday, March 3, 2018, 12 PM. Venue: Convention Hall, 3rd floor, KW Convention Center, 13 Dunsan-jung-ro 134beon-gil, Seo-gu, Daejeon. Congratulations on the wedding!

title: 2018 winter lab workshop
title_en: 2018 winter lab workshop
content: 1월 17일부터 19일까지 2018 동계 연구실 연구실 워크샵을 개최하였다. 강원도 정선에서 열린 워크샵에서는 연구실 전체 세미나를 통해 구성원간 연구 내용을 공유했으며 스키 등의 활동을 통해 그동안 쌓인 스트레스를 풀고 재충전하는 기회로 삼았다.
content_en: We held the 2018 winter lab workshop from January 17 to 19. At the workshop held in Jeongseon, Gangwon-do, members shared their research through a full lab seminar and used activities such as skiing as an opportunity to relieve accumulated stress and recharge.

title: Year_end party
title_en: Year_end party
content: An year_end party was held in La Chow, Chinese restaurant on Dec. 21.
content_en: An year_end party was held in La Chow, Chinese restaurant on Dec. 21.

title: Mr. Jeongju Lee passed the defense
title_en: Mr. Jeongju Lee passed the defense
content: Mr. Jeongju Lee passed the defense for the Master degree on Dec. 21. Congratulation! His thesis title is "An Improved RZF Precoding Technique for Compensating Transceiver I/Q Imbalances in Massive MIMO System."
content_en: Mr. Jeongju Lee passed the defense for the Master degree on Dec. 21. Congratulation! His thesis title is "An Improved RZF Precoding Technique for Compensating Transceiver I/Q Imbalances in Massive MIMO System."

title: Prof. Huang visited our lab.
title_en: Prof. Huang visited our lab.
content: Prof. Kaibin Huang of the University of Hong Kong visited our lab. on Dec. 15. He presented his research activities and discussed with Prof. Park on the possible collaborative research issues.
content_en: Prof. Kaibin Huang of the University of Hong Kong visited our lab. on Dec. 15. He presented his research activities and discussed with Prof. Park on the possible collaborative research issues.

title: Globecom 2017 attended
title_en: Globecom 2017 attended
content: Woowan Wang presented a paper titled, "Precoding for Full-Duplex Multiuser MIMO Systems Using Duality," at Globecom 2017 held in Sigapore.
content_en: Woowan Wang presented a paper titled, "Precoding for Full-Duplex Multiuser MIMO Systems Using Duality," at Globecom 2017 held in Sigapore.

title: 신태동 선배님 결혼
title_en: Wedding of Taedong Shin
content: 2017년 12월 9일 12시에 신태동 선배님의 결혼식이 있었습니다. 결혼을 진심으로 축하드립니다.
content_en: The wedding of Taedong Shin took place at 12:00 on December 9, 2017. Heartfelt congratulations on the wedding.

title: Prof. Park will give a talk on 5G
title_en: Prof. Park will give a talk on 5G
content: Prof. Park will give a talk on 5G mobile communications in KISTEP on Nov. 8.
content_en: Prof. Park will give a talk on 5G mobile communications in KISTEP on Nov. 8.

title: 결혼식 공지
title_en: Wedding announcement
content: ADD에 근무하는 졸업생 두분의 결혼식을 안내합니다. 1. 박휘성동문: 2017년 10월 21일 토요일 오후 4:30 서울 드레스가든 블리스돔 2. 김형수동문: 2017년 11월 5일 일요일 오후 1시 대전 롯데시티호텔 크리스탈볼룸 모두 두분의 결혼을 축하바랍니다.
content_en: We announce the weddings of two alumni working at ADD. 1. Hwisung Park: Saturday, October 21, 2017, 4:30 PM, Seoul Dress Garden Blissdome 2. Hyungsoo Kim: Sunday, November 5, 2017, 1:00 PM, Crystal Ballroom, Lotte City Hotel Daejeon. Please congratulate both of them on their weddings.

title: Wedding anouncement
title_en: Wedding anouncement
content: Mr. Park, Hwisung who graduated in 2014, is said to be married on October 21. Congratulations!
content_en: Mr. Park, Hwisung who graduated in 2014, is said to be married on October 21. Congratulations!

title: New Ph.D student
title_en: New Ph.D student
content: Mr. Arman Ahmadian joined LIT as a Ph.D student. He received M.S degree from the Sharif University of Technology, Iran.
content_en: Mr. Arman Ahmadian joined LIT as a Ph.D student. He received M.S degree from the Sharif University of Technology, Iran.

title: IITP Radio workshop attended
title_en: IITP Radio workshop attended
content: Prof. Park and Mr. Seongbae Jeon attended in IITP Radio workshop held in Jeju Island on Aug. 25.
content_en: Prof. Park and Mr. Seongbae Jeon attended in IITP Radio workshop held in Jeju Island on Aug. 25.

title: APWCS 2017 attended
title_en: APWCS 2017 attended
content: Mr. Seung-chan Lim attended APWCS 2017 held in Incheon, Korea from Aug. 24-25. He is a coauthor of the paper titled, "An Optimal File Placement for Raptor Coded Caching System."
content_en: Mr. Seung-chan Lim attended APWCS 2017 held in Incheon, Korea from Aug. 24-25. He is a coauthor of the paper titled, "An Optimal File Placement for Raptor Coded Caching System."

title: Yonsei-KAIST joint workshop
title_en: Yonsei-KAIST joint workshop
content: A joint workshop with LIT and RAMO Lab was held at Yonsei University on Aug. 18. 11 students presented and discussed their research.
content_en: A joint workshop with LIT and RAMO Lab was held at Yonsei University on Aug. 18. 11 students presented and discussed their research.

title: PIMRC 2017 paper accepted
title_en: PIMRC 2017 paper accepted
content: "CFO Estimation for QAM-FBMC Systems Considering Non-orthogonal Prototype Filters," by Hyungsik Han and Hyuncheol Park has been accepted to the 2017 IEEE 28th Annual International Symposium on Personal, Indoor, and Mobile Radio Communications (PIMRC) to be held in Montreal, QC, Canada, October 8-13, 2017.
content_en: "CFO Estimation for QAM-FBMC Systems Considering Non-orthogonal Prototype Filters," by Hyungsik Han and Hyuncheol Park has been accepted to the 2017 IEEE 28th Annual International Symposium on Personal, Indoor, and Mobile Radio Communications (PIMRC) to be held in Montreal, QC, Canada, October 8-13, 2017.

title: Globecom 2017 paper accepted
title_en: Globecom 2017 paper accepted
content: Jinwoo Kim, Woowan Wang, and Hyuncheol Park, ‘Precoding for Full-Duplex Multiuser MIMO Systems Using Duality’ has been accepted for presentation at the GLOBECOM2017 which will be held in Singapore in December 2017.
content_en: Jinwoo Kim, Woowan Wang, and Hyuncheol Park, ‘Precoding for Full-Duplex Multiuser MIMO Systems Using Duality’ has been accepted for presentation at the GLOBECOM2017 which will be held in Singapore in December 2017.

title: Invited talks at Chongqing, China
title_en: Invited talks at Chongqing, China
content: Professor Park gave talks in the Chongqing University of Technology and 2017 China-Korea AI and ICT Industrial Conference on July 17 and 18, respectively, at Chongqing, China.
content_en: Professor Park gave talks in the Chongqing University of Technology and 2017 China-Korea AI and ICT Industrial Conference on July 17 and 18, respectively, at Chongqing, China.

title: SPAWC 2017 attended
title_en: SPAWC 2017 attended
content: Professor Hyuncheol Park and Mr. Hyunngsik Han attended SPAWC 2017 held in Sapporo, Japan from July 3 to 7. Mr. Han presented a paper coauthored by Mr. Heesu Kim titled "Waveform design for QAM-FBMC system."
content_en: Professor Hyuncheol Park and Mr. Hyunngsik Han attended SPAWC 2017 held in Sapporo, Japan from July 3 to 7. Mr. Han presented a paper coauthored by Mr. Heesu Kim titled "Waveform design for QAM-FBMC system."

title: 2017 summer lab. workshop
title_en: 2017 summer lab. workshop
content: 6월 27일부터 29일까지 2017 하계 연구실 연구실 워크샵을 개최하였다. 무주, 진안 운일암반일암에서 열린 워크샵에서는 레프팅, 산악바이크, 낚시 등의 활동을 통해 그동안 쌓인 스트레스레스를 풀고 재충전하는 기회로 삼았다.
content_en: We held the 2017 summer lab workshop from June 27 to 29. At the workshop held at Unilam-Banilam in Muju and Jinan, we used activities such as rafting, mountain biking, and fishing as an opportunity to relieve accumulated stress and recharge.

title: Mr. Wonseok Lee passed his MS defense
title_en: Mr. Wonseok Lee passed his MS defense
content: Mr. Wonseok Lee passed his MS defense on June 19. His thesis title is “Optimal file placement in wireless coded caching systems.” Congratulation! Currently he is hired by Hyundai Mobis.
content_en: Mr. Wonseok Lee passed his MS defense on June 19. His thesis title is “Optimal file placement in wireless coded caching systems.” Congratulation! Currently he is hired by Hyundai Mobis.

title: Ms Eunhye Heo passed her Ph.D defense.
title_en: Ms Eunhye Heo passed her Ph.D defense.
content: Ms Eunhye Heo passed her Ph.D defense on May 29. Her thesis title is "Estimation of Uplink Parameters in Cloud Radio Access Networks." Congratulation! She received a job offer from the Samsung Electronics.
content_en: Ms Eunhye Heo passed her Ph.D defense on May 29. Her thesis title is "Estimation of Uplink Parameters in Cloud Radio Access Networks." Congratulation! She received a job offer from the Samsung Electronics.

title: [Event] 2017 Homecoming Day (2017/05/13)
title_en: [Event] 2017 Homecoming Day (2017/05/13)
content: 안녕하세요. 올해 스승의 날을 맞이하여, 정보전송연구실(LIT) 홈커밍데이 일정을 알려드리고자 합니다. ------------------------------------------------------------------------- *일시: 2017년 5월 13일 (토요일) *일정 13:00 (KAIST N1빌딩 718호 연구실) 모임장소 (KAIST N1빌딩 709호 세미나실) 스승의 날 감사행사 14:00 (갈마공원 운동장) 축구경기 및 기타 체육행사 (주소: 대전광역시 서구 갈마역로 55) (주차: 갈마역 2번출구쪽에 노상주차 또는 올림픽기념 국민생활관 유료주차장 이용(3시간 기준 3700원)) 17:30 (어은동 대나무골) 저녁식사 ------------------------------------------------------------------------- 기타 궁금하신 사항은 아래로 연락 주시면 감사하겠습니다. 전화: 010-3072-8996 (권기림) 042-350-6817 (LIT 연구실) E-mail: girim88@kaist.ac.kr (권기림) 감사합니다.
content_en: Hello. To celebrate Teacher's Day this year, we would like to announce the schedule for the Lab of Information Transmission (LIT) Homecoming Day. ------------------------------------------------------------------------- *Date: Saturday, May 13, 2017 *Program 13:00 (KAIST N1 Building, Lab 718) Gathering place (KAIST N1 Building, Seminar Room 709) Teacher's Day appreciation event 14:00 (Galma Park Field) Soccer match and other sports events (Address: 55 Galmayeok-ro, Seo-gu, Daejeon) (Parking: on-street parking near Exit 2 of Galma Station, or use the paid parking lot at the Olympic Memorial National Sports Center (3,700 KRW for 3 hours)) 17:30 (Daenamugol, Eoeun-dong) Dinner ------------------------------------------------------------------------- If you have any other questions, please contact us below. Phone: 010-3072-8996 (Girim Kwon), 042-350-6817 (LIT Lab) E-mail: girim88@kaist.ac.kr (Girim Kwon) Thank you.
